Goblin {{ .Chart.Version }} is installed in namespace {{ .Release.Namespace }},
running images tagged {{ include "goblin.operatorTag" . }}.

Watch the operator come up:

  kubectl -n {{ .Release.Namespace }} rollout status deploy/goblin-controller-manager

The operator creates the scout Deployment itself. It should appear shortly:

  kubectl -n {{ .Release.Namespace }} get deploy goblin-scout

{{ if not .Values.telegram.enabled }}
WARNING: telegram.enabled is false. The scout has no notifier, so it will act
on incidents without asking a human first. Set telegram.botToken and
telegram.chatID to restore the approval step.
{{- else }}
The scout will message your Telegram chat when it picks up an incident.
{{- end }}

Incidents are raised from IncidentPolicy objects. None ship with this chart —
see config/samples/policies/ in the repository for examples.
